description: A Solar Energy Systems Engineer is preparing an interconnection application for a new 100 MW utility-scale PV plant in Phoenix, AZ. Perform a Ramp Rate Study using PySAM and TMY weather data to determine the maximum hourly AC generation, the maximum hourly up-ramp, and the maximum hourly down-ramp (in MW) for a full year of operation, where ramp is defined as the power change between consecutive hours (t - t-1). Save the results to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/ramp_rate_analysis.json using the structure: {"system_size_mw_dc": 100, "max_hourly_generation_mw": <float>, "max_up_ramp_mw_per_hr": <float>, "max_down_ramp_mw_per_hr": <float>}. Save the Python analysis script to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/ramp_analysis_script.py.
